mapper.sql: p.id, p.user_id, u.nickname AS author_name, u.avatar_url, p.title, p.content, p.image_url, p.tags, p.ip_location, p.visibility, p.created_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes l WHERE l.post_id = p.id) AS like_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments c WHERE c.post_id = p.id) AS comment_count, CASE WHEN #{viewerId} IS NULL THEN FALSE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM likes ml WHERE ml.post_id = p.id AND ml.user_id = #{viewerId}) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS liked_by_me
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (user_id, title, content, image_url, tags, ip_location, ip_address, visibility, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{imageUrl}, #{tags}, #{ipLocation}, #{ipAddress}, #{visibility}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM posts p JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE p.id = #{id}
AND p.visibility = 'PUBLIC'

SELECT FROM posts p JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE 1 = 1
AND p.visibility = 'PUBLIC'
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND p.image_url IS NOT NULL AND p.image_url != ''
AND p.user_id = #{viewerId}
AND FIND_IN_SET(SUBSTRING(#{filter}, 5), p.tags)
ORDER BY
like_count DESC, comment_count DESC, p.created_at DESC p.created_at DESC
SELECT FROM posts p JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.visibility = 'PUBLIC' ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET visibility = #{visibility}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE visibility = 'HIDDEN'
